name: functions
description: Firebase Functions for CC Legal API

scripts.build: npm run copy-server && tsc && npm run fix-output
scripts.copy-server: mkdir -p lib/server/services && mkdir -p lib/public/pdfs && mkdir -p lib/templates && cp ../server/services/supabaseService.js ../server/services/workflowResultsService.js ../server/services/coldLeadsService.js ../server/services/emailGenerationWorkflow.js ../server/services/configService.js ../server/services/instantlyService.js ../server/services/firecrawlService.js ../server/services/openaiService.js ../server/services/emailService.js ../server/services/documentGenerationService.js lib/server/services/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r ../public/pdfs/* lib/public/pdfs/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r ../server/templates/* lib/templates/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.fix-output: if [ -d lib/functions/src ]; then cp -r lib/functions/src/* lib/ && rm -rf lib/functions; fi
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
